channel.title: Fort Worth - Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: Beer for Breakfast on KDGE 102.1 The Edge Dallas/Fort Worth Radio
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
This week on Beer America, we were invited to Beer for Breakfast on Dallas/Fort Worth radio KDGE 102.1 The Edge . Morning show host Vydra tries a new beer each week at 8:10am, but there was one beer no one could get her in the state of Texas, except us of course! They rank beers, […]

The post Beer for Breakfast on KDGE 102.1 The Edge Dallas/Fort Worth Radio first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: An Interview with Fritz Rahr of Rahr & Sons Brewing, Ep. 145
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Not many brewers can say their family has been brewing in the US for over 150 years, but Fritz Rahr certainly can . The Beer America team of Paul Leone and John Pinkerton spent some time with Fritz and learned many things like their brewing history, why limited edition beers are limited edition, and that […]

The post An Interview with Fritz Rahr of Rahr & Sons Brewing, Ep. 145 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Rahr & Sons: Bucking Bock, Ep. 140
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Spring brings flowers, green grass, warmer weather and for Beer America TV, it also brings Bock beers. This week we dive into an excellent Bock beer from Rahr & Sons located in Fort Worth Texas. It’s a an extremely well balanced beer and true to the style with a hefty 7.5 % ABV . Easy […]

The post Rahr & Sons: Bucking Bock, Ep. 140 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Rahr & Sons Brewing Company: Winter Warmer, Ep. 123
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Living in Fort Worth Texas has many good aspects to it, and of course one of those good things is living close to Rahr & Sons Brewing Company. This week on Beer America TV we discuss their Winter Warmer, which is described as an English Dark Ale . Thick and hearty in appearance, this 8.5% […]

The post Rahr & Sons Brewing Company: Winter Warmer, Ep. 123 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Delay in BATV Vlogs
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
I want to apologize for the delay in posting more beer vlogs! Since moving to Fort Worth Texas, I’ve been extremely busy with my full time paying gig . Before coming here however, we shot a bunch of new beers that I will roll out soon! Behind the scenes, I’ve been continually working on launching […]

The post Delay in BATV Vlogs first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.
